commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And of it he shall offer one out of the whole offering for a heave offering unto the LORD, and it shall be the priest's that sprinkles the blood of the peace offerings. Of which leavened bread, one, representing all the rest, shall be offered for first-fruits. Hebrew, "a heave-offering "not as a sacrifice. (Menochius) Others maintain that a loaf, without leaven, was laid upon the altar; and all the rest given to the priest.
